caption: Tired of your liner playing disappearing acts? We get it. That's why we engineered something different. No more mid-day meltdowns or smudged regrets. Just sharp lines that stick with you, no matter what the city throws your way. ✨

hook.text: Seriously, how many times has your eyeliner ghosted you mid-day?

cta.text: Link in bio to reclaim your line.

script.visuals: A young woman (early 20s, dark hair, hazel eyes, subtle freckles, lean build), dressed in stylish street clothes, stands under a vibrant, graffiti-covered wall in a bustling urban alley. A light drizzle starts. She's just shared an intense laugh with off-screen friends. She pulls out her phone, opens the camera for a quick selfie, and sees her previously sharp black eyeliner is smudged badly under her eyes and at the outer corners, creating a raccoon-like effect. Her initially joyful expression shifts to a genuinely annoyed and frustrated grimace. A subtle accessory (e.g., scarf or earring) features brand color #4f8ef7.
script.voiceover: Seriously, how many times has your eyeliner ghosted you mid-day? One laugh, one drop of rain, and boom. Gone.

visual_direction.color_usage: vibrant street art in background, pop of brand color (#4f8ef7) in character's accessory
